sections.name: Navbar
sections.description: Sticky glass navbar (logo left, menu center, CTA right, blur on scroll). Use crystal glass styling.

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Split layout. Left: badge, large 2-3 line heading, description, primary+secondary CTA, emergency badge, opening hours card. Right: large doctor image with floating glass cards (Happy Patients, Online Consultation, Emergency, Rating, Experience). Soft blue gradient background with abstract medical shapes.

sections.name: Services
sections.description: Responsive 3-column grid with cards (image, icon, title, description, Learn More). Hover: lift, image zoom, shadow, gradient border, arrow slide.

sections.name: About
sections.description: Two columns. Large healthcare image + floating info card overlapping. Right: headline, description, 3 animated stat cards, CTA. Counter animation on scroll.

sections.name: Features
sections.description: Modern Bento Grid Layout, glass hover, subtle gradients.

sections.name: Doctors
sections.description: Modern team cards, rounded images, hover overlay reveals social icons, image zoom.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.description: Auto scrolling infinite slider, glass cards, 5-star rating.

sections.name: Appointment Form
sections.description: Modern glass card, rounded inputs, floating labels, beautiful submit button, doctor illustration.

sections.name: Footer
sections.description: Dark premium footer with newsletter, quick links, social, contact, large spacing. Dark background contrasting the rest of the light page.

components_to_use: Shadcn Input, Form, Select, and Button for Appointment Form and Newsletter
Framer Motion for scroll animations, hover states, bento grid reveals, and floating glass cards in hero
React Fast Marquee for infinite scrolling testimonials
instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use a standard medical template look. The site MUST feel like a high-end Stripe/Vercel/Linear SaaS product, integrating clean design with elegant healthcare branding.
Use EXACTLY these colors: Primary #4F46E5, Secondary #2563EB, Accent #8B5CF6, Background #F8FAFC, Surface #FFFFFF, Text #0F172A, Border #E2E8F0.
Apply 'rounded-[24px]' to major cards, sections, and images to meet the user's specific 20-24px requirement.
Implement premium glassmorphism using 'bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40' for floating cards in the hero and the sticky navbar.
Use layered soft shadows: e.g. 'shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]'. Add dynamic hover states 'hover:shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgb(79,70,229,0.1)]'.
Create premium blue gradients using the Primary (#4F46E5) and Secondary (#2563EB) colors for hero backgrounds, CTA buttons, and subtle bento bgs.
Typography: Use 'font-sans' with Plus Jakarta Sans for headings (tight tracking, large sizes) and Inter for readable body text.
Ensure ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, accordions) contain a `data-testid` attribute based on their functional role.
Bento Features grid: Utilize col-span-1 and col-span-2 asymmetrical spans. Use 'h-full' to ensure cards match height and there are no jagged bottoms.
For the Appointment Form and Newsletter sections, ensure standard form management that saves data appropriately (e.g. backend api routes / MongoDB integration).
